metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5479
metadata.comment:
Rationale: electron microscopy showed B-raf (BRAF) was enriched in dendritic spines of rat hippocampus and neocortex. Subsynaptically, it was observed in the PSD, spine apparatus and throughout the dendritic spine.. Experimental description: "Four male Wistar rats (130 g) were anesthetized with pentobarbital (40 mg/kg) and ..."

to confirm authors targeted the B-raf protein we annotated;
"Our immunoblotting experiments revealed a 95 kDa molecule, which we tentatively identified as the B-raf protein. This 95 kDa form is also predominant in mouse kidney (Kolch et al., unpublished data), and is presumably the product of an alternate-sized B-raf transcript"

"Specificity of the antiserum was tested with Western blotting."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
